privileged_info_summary: The task instructions explicitly require outputting files to C:\Users\Docker\Documents\MetricsReport.xlsx and C:\Users\Docker\Documents\HighestComplexity.txt. However, this task is fundamentally defective because the setup script (setup_task.ps1) and the target C# solution 'JitterPhysicsCore' are completely absent from the environment. Consequently, the actual method with the highest Cyclomatic Complexity cannot be verified.
